an1.248-257:1.1:
(248) "Bhikkhus, the foremost of my male lay followers in being the first to go for refuge
are the merchants Tapussa and Bhallika."
an1.248-257:1.2: (249) " … among donors is the householder Sudatta Anāthapiṇḍika."
an1.248-257:1.3: (250) " … among speakers on the Dhamma is the householder Citta of Macchikāsaṇḍa."
an1.248-257:1.4: (251) " … among those who make use of the four means of attracting and sustaining others is Hatthaka of Āḷavī."
an1.248-257:1.5: (252) " … among those who give what is excellent is Mahānāma the Sakyan."
an1.248-257:1.6: (253) " … among those who give what is agreeable is the householder Ugga of Vesālī."
an1.248-257:1.7: (254) " … among attendants of the Saṅgha is the householder Uggata."
an1.248-257:1.8: (255) " … among those with unwavering confidence is Sūra Ambaṭṭha."
an1.248-257:1.9: (256) " … among those with confidence in persons is Jīvaka Komārabhacca."
an1.248-257:1.10: (257) " … among those who have trust is the householder Nakulapitā."
